recommendations.title: Hairspray Live!
recommendations.genres: Romance, Comedy, Drama, TV Movie, Music
recommendations.overview: A teenage girl living in Baltimore in the early 1960s dreams of appearing on a popular TV dance show.

recommendations.title: El Cantante
recommendations.overview: The rise and fall of salsa singer, Héctor Lavoe (1946-1993), as told from the perspective of his wife Puchi, who looks back from 2002.

recommendations.title: Under the Sea: A Descendants Story
recommendations.overview: Mal emerges from the shadows of a mystical forest onto a dark coastline where she crosses paths with Dizzy.

recommendations.title: Camp Rock
recommendations.genres: Music, Comedy, Drama, Romance, Family, TV Movie
recommendations.overview: When Mitchie gets a chance to attend Camp Rock, her life takes an unpredictable twist, and she learns just how important it is to be true to yourself.

recommendations.title: The Dirt
recommendations.overview: The story of Mötley Crüe and their rise from the Sunset Strip club scene of the early 1980s to superstardom.

recommendations.title: Mixed by Erry
recommendations.overview: The rise and fall of the pirate mixtape empire of three brothers from Naples, Italy, during the '80s.

recommendations.title: SLC Punk
recommendations.overview: Two former geeks become 1980s punks, then party and go to concerts while deciding what to do with their lives.

recommendations.title: Elvis
recommendations.overview: This biopic traces Elvis Presley’s life from his impoverished childhood to his meteoric rise to stardom to his triumphant conquering of Las Vegas.

recommendations.title: Fierce
recommendations.overview: Talent and passion for music can take one to the very top. On the way, however, there are going to be showbiz traps.

recommendations.title: Magical Mystery Tour
recommendations.overview: While on a coach tour, The Beatles and a few dozen friends experience strange happenings caused by magicians.
recommendations.director: Ringo Starr, George Harrison, Paul McCartney, Bernard Knowles, John Lennon
